= Jogan-ji =

revision.text:
{ [[File:Mitani_Shrine.png|thumb]]
{{ill|Mitanino Shrine|WD=Q135038741|1=Mitanino Shrine}} is a shrine in the Engishiki.<ref>https://jun-yu-roku.com/yamashiro-otokuni-jododani-mitani/</ref> This shrine is not very well known historically. Possibly linked to the nearby temple Jogan-ji 乗願寺<ref>https://kyonoreijo.sakura.ne.jp/rakusaik/rsk91.htm</ref>.<ref>https://youtu.be/_829_Fz2mLc</ref>
== Gods ==
* '''[[:ja:天児屋根命|天児屋根命]]''' * '''[[:ja:応神天皇|応神天皇]]''' * '''[[:ja:別雷神|別雷神]]''' * '''[[:ja:倉稲魂神|倉稲魂神]]'''
